Use this API to return two-winding transformer name. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, string = xfrnam(ibus, jbus, ickt)
Use this API to return zone totals. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, cmpval = zndat(iar, string)
Use this API to return the interchange between two zones. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, cmpval = znitoj(iar, jar)

This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine zone_2, and is implemented by a call to zone_2. Use this API to tabulate zone totals by zone. This API routine was first introduce
Use this API to tabulate zone totals by zone. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.0. ierr = zone_2(sid, all, opt)
Use this API to tabulate zone totals by zone, along with subtotals by area. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = zone_area(sid, all)
Use this API to modify zone data in the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Zone Data). This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = zone_data(izone, zoname)

This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine zonm_2, and is implemented by a call to zonm_2. Use this API to reassign the buses and loads in a specified subsystem of the worki

Use this API routine to reassign the buses, loads and/or induction machines in a specified subsystem of the working case from their original zone to a designated zone. This API routine was first intro
Use this API to return the zone name. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, cval = zonnam(iar)
Use this API to return the zone number. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, iar = zonnum(string)
Use this API to indicate whether a zone is in use. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ival = zonuse(iar)
Use this API to define a zone subsystem. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = zsys(sid, num, zones)
Use this API to set the definition of an zone subsystem. This can be used to toggle a particular zone subsystem on or off. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = zsysdef(sid,
Use this API to initialize or re-initialize a zone subsystem. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = zsysinit(sid)
